title: Add marketing_service unit tests for launch/pause/stats/record_event
description: Add marketing_service tests in tests/unit/test_marketing_service.py covering the 6 untested methods: test_launch_campaign (create campaign, launch, assert status=='active'), test_pause_campaign (create+launch, pause, assert status=='paused'), test_get_campaign_stats (create+launch campaign, call get_campaign_stats, assert result.data has 'sent' and 'opened' keys), test_record_event (record_event for customer_id, assert returns event with correct type), test_get_user_events (record 2 events, get_user_events returns list with len==2), test_setup_trigger (setup_trigger with condition+action, assert trigger is created/enabled). Uses MarketingService and Campaign model.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_marketing_service.py -v — all 9 tests pass (3 existing + 6 new); grep confirms 6 new test names: test_launch_campaign, test_pause_campaign, test_get_campaign_stats, test_record_event, test_get_user_events, test_setup_trigger; pytest tests/unit/ -q — suite still green
